privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for investigative_opsec_workspace task by confirming that the OPSEC protocol instructions and initial Chrome bookmarks are synthetically generated directly via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected folders ('Secure Comms', 'Public Records', 'Target Intel', 'News Outlets'), the personal domains to purge ('netflix.com', 'hulu.com', 'facebook.com', 'instagram.com', 'twitter.com'), the search engines ('pacer', 'offshore'), and the download directory ('Secure_Vault') all exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the setup scripts.
